---
title: "Templates"
description: "Browse the first-party Anvilkit seed templates — landing pages, blog layouts, pricing, contact, and about. Scaffold any of them with `npx anvilkit init --template <slug>`."
---

Each first-party seed template composes real `@anvilkit/*` component packages —
zero placeholders — and scaffolds into a running Puck project with one CLI call:

```sh
npx anvilkit init --template <slug> my-site
```
